bookings.note: Referred by Beverly Hills suite, looking for a full natural reconstruction overlay. Confirmed thermal sensitivity.
Immediate tooth replacement evaluation needed. Patient prefer organic tea options during visit.
Zoom Whitening prior to wedding weekend. Requesting noise-canceling headphones for audio comfort.

contacts.name: Margot Laurent
contacts.message: Hello, I wanted to schedule a detailed 3D digital mockup before initiating any clinical preps for veneers. Do you provide digital mockups in the first session?

contacts.name: Harrison Forde
contacts.message: Hello Ivory Clinic! I have extreme sensitivity due to metal crowns. Do you provide all-porcelain or zirconia options that are 100% metal-free?
